game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Terraforming Mars:** Players lead a corporation to terraform Mars over a series of generations, primarily by playing project cards from their hand that cost MegaCredits (MC) and have effects on global parameters or player resources. Interaction involves tapping cards to select them, then tapping on the game board to place tiles like cities or forests, or tapping on global trackers to increase Temperature, Oxygen, or create Oceans. Each generation cycles through a research phase for drawing new cards, an action phase for playing cards and activating standard projects, and a production phase for resource generation based on current ratings. Players earn Terraform Rating (TR) points by increasing global parameters, which also boosts their income, and accumulate Victory Points (VP) from TR, played cards, and achieving specific milestones like building 3 cities. The game concludes when all global parameters (Temperature to +8°C, Oxygen to 14%, 9 Oceans) reach their target values, and the player with the highest total Victory Points wins.
game_info.description: Lead your corporation to terraform Mars! Play project cards to transform the red planet by raising Temperature, increasing Oxygen levels, and placing Oceans. Each generation, you'll research new cards, play projects, and generate resources. Earn Terraform Rating (TR) points by improving global parameters, which also boosts your income. Accumulate Victory Points from TR, played cards, and achievements. The game ends when all three global parameters reach their target values. The corporation with the most Victory Points wins!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu/card selection
Space: Confirm selection/Play selected card
Z: Cancel current action/Return to previous state
Shift: View detailed card information
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to title screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic gameplay mechanics test. Validates that the player can navigate through game phases, select and play cards, and that global parameters update correctly. Tests basic resource generation and card effects.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Play a sequence of standard projects and simple cards that increase global parameters. Focus on building oceans and forests first as they're straightforward. Verify that each action properly updates resources and global trackers.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully completes multiple generations without errors. Global parameters increase as cards are played. Resources generate each production phase. No game crashes or state inconsistencies occur during basic gameplay flow.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Validates that the game can be won by reaching all global parameter targets and correctly calculates victory points. Tests the complete game loop from start to victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Efficiently play cards and standard projects that maximize global parameter increases. Prioritize ocean placement, then temperature and oxygen increases. Balance resource generation with parameter improvements. Aim to complete all three parameters as quickly as possible.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully reaches all three global parameter targets (9 Oceans, +8°C Temperature, 14% Oxygen). Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Victory points are correctly calculated from TR, cards played, and milestones achieved. Final score is displayed properly.
